item.title: Italy's Top Court: Hotels Aren't Obligated to Serve Tap Water - Newser
item.description: Italy's Top Court: Hotels Aren't Obligated to Serve Tap Water  NewserHotel’s refusal to serve guest tap water at restaurant is lawful, top Italian court rules  CNNWhere in Europe is tap water guaranteed?  Euronews.comHotel that refused to give tourist tap water acted lawfully, Italian court rules  BBCItaly’s top court rules against tourist refused tap water in Dolomites hotel  The Guardian
